name: container_map_4k_not_subset_allocated
code:
proof fn phi_1_container_map_4k_not_subset_allocated(
    pa: PageAllocator,
    c: ContainerPtr,
    p: PagePtr,
)
    requires
        pa.wf(),
        pa.container_map_4k@.dom().contains(c),
        pa.container_map_4k@[c].contains(p),
        !pa.allocated_pages_4k@.contains(p),
    ensures
        pa.container_map_4k@[c].contains(p),
{
}
reason: container_map_4k tracks per-container page ownership but wf() may not require these pages to actually be in allocated_pages_4k — containers could claim unallocated pages

proof fn phi_4_mapped_page_no_mappings_tracked(
    pa: PageAllocator,
    p: PagePtr,
)
    requires
        pa.wf(),
        pa.mapped_pages_4k@.contains(p),
        pa.page_mappings(p) =~= Set::empty(),
    ensures
        pa.mapped_pages_4k@.contains(p),
{
}
reason: A page can be in Mapped4k state yet have an empty mappings set — the spec may not require mapped pages to have at least one mapping recorded

name: remove_preserves_get_node_ref_for_removed
code:
proof fn phi_5_remove_preserves_get_node_ref_for_removed<T: Copy, const N: usize>(
    old_sll: StaticLinkedList<T, N>,
    new_sll: StaticLinkedList<T, N>,
    remove_index: SLLIndex,
    v: T,
    other: T,
)
    requires
        old_sll.wf(),
        old_sll.unique(),
        old_sll@.contains(v),
        old_sll.get_node_ref(v) == remove_index,
        new_sll.wf(),
        new_sll.unique(),
        new_sll@ =~= old_sll@.remove_value(v),
        new_sll@.contains(other),
        other != v,
        old_sll.get_node_ref(other) == new_sll.get_node_ref(other),
    ensures
        new_sll@.contains(other),
{
}
reason: remove's ensures preserves get_node_ref for remaining elements — validates the node reference stability invariant across removal
